Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Petition Of Hai Zheng To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Vacated

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Vienna Sze. Charles Triay for Hai Zheng.

Mr. Triay stated that they were not able to settle the case. Ms. Ebey stated that they are working on obtaining Taiwan Counsel. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate was set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on February 2, 2015 (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

Petition To Recover Funds Into Estate, And For Double Damages
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Triay for Hai Zheng, Zhufeng Shen, Aifeng Shen and Xiufeng Shen. Amanda Ebey for Vienna Sze. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mary Cheung was not present. Mr. Triay stated that he was told by the Administrator that Ms. Cheung paid back the funds ($59,000.00 or $60,000.00) that were in dispute, that his Clients will dismiss their petition without prejudice and that they will not pursue double damages. The Petition to Recover Funds into Estate is dismissed without prejudice at Counsel's request. The Parties are in dispute as to the issue of who the Decedent's relatives/heirs are. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 28, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 2, 2014. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution was continued to and the Parties are to return on April 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Vienna Sze. Charles Triay appeared by telephone for Petitioners. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Mary Cheung in Propria Persona.

Mr. Triay stated that no response or opposition to the petition has been filed, and that he hopes to have an objection filed, do discovery and set the matter for trial. Ms. Ebey stated that she would be happy to file something, that it will be identical to what's already on file and that she will file it this week. Mr. Ferdon stated that there is a document purporting that Ms. Cheung is to receive all of the Decedent's belongings in the apartment not the Estate, that Ms. Cheung has possession of a bank account, and that Ms. Cheung has closed out a Bank of America account with a substantial amount of funds. Ms. Cheung stated that there was about $50,000.00, that she was able to close out the account with a death certificate, that there medical bills and funeral expenses. The Court strongly advised Ms. Cheung to seek Counsel and asked Mr. Ferdon to speak with Ms. Cheung. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate was continued to January 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
